name: pi-webhost
description: Self-hosted web interface for the Pi coding agent

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/web && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/server && npm run typecheck -w packages/web
